ns0:entry.ns0:title: [swift] DaveWoodCom/XCGLogger
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DaveWoodCom/XCGLogger
Language: swift
A debug log framework for use in Swift projects. Allows you to log details to the console (and optionally a file), just like you would have with NSLog() or print(), but with additional information, such as the date, function name, filename and line number.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [ruby] norman/friendly_id
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/norman/friendly_id
Language: ruby
FriendlyId is the “Swiss Army bulldozer” of slugging and permalink plugins for ActiveRecord. It allows you to create pretty URL’s and work with human-friendly strings as if they were numeric ids for ActiveRecord models.

URL: https://github.com/lunasaw/voglander
Language: java
Voglander 是基于 Spring Boot 3.5 + Java 17 的企业级视频监控平台，支持 GB28181、JT/T 1078、ONVIF、SIP Gateway、ZLMediaKit、IPC/NVR 接入、实时点播、录像回放、流媒体转发、NAT 穿透和国标级联。
